title: Apply predator trapping techniques
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply predator trapping techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess site and predator trapping requirements

pcs.text: Identify purpose of animal capture and set objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify purpose of animal capture and set objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify purpose of animal capture and set objectives.

pcs.text: Confirm the location and extent of the pest problem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the location and extent of the pest problem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the location and extent of the pest problem.

pcs.text: Confirm target animal movement patterns and behaviour to determine trapping location and placement of equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm target animal movement patterns and behaviour to determine trapping location and placement of equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm target animal movement patterns and behaviour to determine trapping location and placement of equipment.

pcs.text: Identify non-target animals present in the area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify non-target animals present in the area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify non-target animals present in the area.

pcs.text: Estimate time required to complete trapping
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate time required to complete trapping?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate time required to complete trapping.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess site and predator trapping requirements

elements.title: Prepare equipment required for trapping

pcs.text: Identify and check vehicles, materials and equipment required for trapping
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and check vehicles, materials and equipment required for trapping?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and check vehicles, materials and equipment required for trapping.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain trapping equipment and prepare traps for trapping
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain trapping equipment and prepare traps for trapping?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain trapping equipment and prepare traps for trapping.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Assess site access requirements and obtain authority and permits to enter property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site access requirements and obtain authority and permits to enter property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site access requirements and obtain authority and permits to enter property.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards to non-target animals from trapping, and implement control strategies to mitigate risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards to non-target animals from trapping, and implement control strategies to mitigate risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards to non-target animals from trapping, and implement control strategies to mitigate risk.

pcs.text: Tune, modify and prepare traps to minimise non-target capture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Tune, modify and prepare traps to minimise non-target capture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Tune, modify and prepare traps to minimise non-target capture.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare equipment required for trapping

elements.title: Place and set traps

pcs.text: Undertake site surveillance to identify target and non-target animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake site surveillance to identify target and non-target animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake site surveillance to identify target and non-target animals.

pcs.text: Identify and interpret signs of target animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and interpret signs of target animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and interpret signs of target animal.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Select and prepare trap site to maximise opportunity of trapping target animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare trap site to maximise opportunity of trapping target animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare trap site to maximise opportunity of trapping target animals.

pcs.text: Position, set, calibrate and check trapping equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position, set, calibrate and check trapping equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position, set, calibrate and check trapping equipment.

pcs.text: Apply lures, decoys or baits and toxins according to trapping objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply lures, decoys or baits and toxins according to trapping objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply lures, decoys or baits and toxins according to trapping objectives.

pcs.text: Camouflage traps according to trap design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Camouflage traps according to trap design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Camouflage traps according to trap design.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Place and set traps

elements.title: Check and remove traps

pcs.text: Inspect traps according to frequency specified in trapping objectives and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect traps according to frequency specified in trapping objectives and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect traps according to frequency specified in trapping objectives and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Identify trapped animals, then release, destroy or prepare for transport according to trapping objective
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify trapped animals, then release, destroy or prepare for transport according to trapping objective?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify trapped animals, then release, destroy or prepare for transport according to trapping objective.

pcs.text: Handle and transport captured animals humanely according to animal welfare codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and transport captured animals humanely according to animal welfare codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and transport captured animals humanely according to animal welfare codes of practice.

pcs.text: Observe workplace health and safety procedures and public safety requirements during trapping activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe workplace health and safety procedures and public safety requirements during trapping activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe workplace health and safety procedures and public safety requirements during trapping activities.

pcs.text: Render traps safe and remove trap according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Render traps safe and remove trap according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Render traps safe and remove trap according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Restore trap site to its prior condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Restore trap site to its prior condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Restore trap site to its prior condition.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Check and remove traps

pcs.text: Record details of trapping activities according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record trap locations and captures according to workplace record-keeping procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove, retain or dispose of carcases according to workplace health and safety and biosecurity procedures.
